zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Dammartin於大約1166年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾時，她的父親Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II30歲，母親Mahaut Matilde de Clermont28歲。她於1182年與Hugh de Gournay V在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1238年在英國諾福爾可凱斯特享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Dammartin于大约1166年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾时，她的父亲Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II30岁，母亲Mahaut Matilde de Clermont28岁。她于1182年与Hugh de Gournay V在英国萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1238年在英国諾福爾可凱斯特享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Dammartin was born about 1166, in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, was 30 and her mother, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, was 28. She married Hugh de Gournay V in 1182, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1238, in Caister, Norfolk, England, at the age of 73.

fr.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Dammartin est née environ 1166, à Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Gournay V en 1182, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1238, à Caister, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Dammartin um 1166 in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II 30 und ihre Mutter Mahaut Matilde de Clermont 28. Sie hat 1182 in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England Hugh de Gournay V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1238 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Caister, Norfolk, England.

Lei sposato Hugh de Gournay V nel 1182, nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1238, nel Caister, Norfolk, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Dammartinが約1166年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンダンマルティン-エン-ゴeルで生まれた時，父Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello IIは30歳，母Mahaut Matilde de Clermontは28歳であった。1182年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチでHugh de Gournay Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1238年にイギリスノーフォルクケイスターで73歳で死去した。

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Dammartin(이)가 대략 1166년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니 다마틴--고e일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut Matilde de Clermont(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1182년 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치에서 Hugh de Gournay V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1238년 영국 노르폴크 케이스터에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Dammartin nasceu aproximadamente 1166, em Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Gournay V em 1182, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1238, em Caister, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Dammartin родилась около 1166 г. в местности даммартин-ен-гоeл, сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Gournay V в 1182 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1238 г. в местности цеистир, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

Se casó con Hugh de Gournay V en 1182, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1238, en Caister, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
